Video.summary: Frankly my dear, guest star Richard Chamberlain gives it his all in "Gone With The Breeze".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Image.alt: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Robert Goulet, Rich Little & Pat Carroll guest. Rich impresses while Robert & Pat join "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little
Pat Carroll, Robert Goulet, Rich Little

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Guests Chita Rivera and Vince Edwards help spoof "distinguished women's movies" in "To Each Her Own Tears."
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Vince Edwards

Video.summary: Jim Nabors is like Caine in "Kung Fu" in a spoof of the David Carradine TV series, here entitled "Yung Fool."
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Carol's good luck charm Jim Nabors guest stars!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars as a husband who is visited by the water department. Mrs. Wiggins and Mr. Tudball celebrate.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Tonights guests are Tim Conway and Eydie Gorme!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in the latest "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Debbie Reynolds and John Davidson guest star, highlighted by the stirring saga So Proudly We Heal.
Video.title: Debbie Reynolds, John Davidson

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca take part in a fairy tale musical extravaganza.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Lily Tomlin & Steve Lawrence star! Lily plays a prison matron while Steve plays a crime boss on his honeymoon.
Video.title: Lily Tomlin, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Imogene Coca joins Carol, while Harvey and Carol interview with Miss America and the parody "Bonnie And Clod."
Video.title: Imogene Coca

Video.summary: Jack Klugman stars as a man annoyed by his sister-in-law. Also: Carol, Tim and Harvey get a little work done.
Video.title: Jack Klugman

Video.summary: Jack Gilford guests. Gilford plays a man whose life is transformed by a hat and drops in on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Vicki plays an author whose changes to her story are acted out, and Tim demonstrates the latest in safety.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors and Alice Ghostley guest! Alice is Roger's sister in "Carol & Sis", and Jim has an unusual date.
Video.title: Alice Ghostley, Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join Carol and company for sketch entitled: "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: In this episode, Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Harvey Korman leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marily Horne

Video.summary: Guest George Gobel joins a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess. A "Carol & Sis" sketch is also a prank.
Video.title: George Gobel

Video.summary: Jack Klugman & Tony Randall guest. Jack sings with Carol, while Tony appears in a tribute to Broadway sketch.
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Sid Caesar and Barbara McNair guest. McNair and Carol spoof a series, and "V.I.P." features silent film stars.
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Guest James Coco appears in movie spoof, "One Way Ticket," while Carol gets into an argument with margarine.
Video.title: James Coco

Video.summary: Features Harvey & Carol encounter a wishing well, and another installment of "The Family."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carl Reiner guests. Featuring WWII film "The Plot To Hurt Hitler." Also: "The Writer" & "Terminal Hospital."
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Harvey leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family. Carol interviews Hugh Handsome, and a cameo by Bob Hope!
Video.title: Bob Hope

Video.summary: Tim Conway & the cast head to Sydney, Australia! Tim leads the Sydney Orchestra, & Harvey deals with co-star.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mr. Steve Lawrence joins Carol in a sketch about a traveling couple sharing some honesty with each other.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: John Byner & Francine Beers star! Includes a convict seeking refuge, Carol & Vicki as robots, & "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: John Byner & Petula Clark star. TV commercial spoofs and the firing of Donald Duck are on tap tonight.
Video.title: John Byner, Petula Clark

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Tim Conway star. Features singles out on the town, and "Arrivaderci Summertime."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Jack Cassidy & Tim Conway star! Tim plays an orphan, then joins Jack and Carol for "The Story Of A Star."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy
